message:
feat(iter,conformance): implement transfer selector/overlap/flatiter/nditer subsystem in fnp-iter and wire conformance tests

Major new subsystem in fnp-iter replacing the placeholder with a full
NumPy-compatible transfer infrastructure (+539 lines):

- TransferSelectorInput + select_transfer_class: deterministic classification
  of array transfers into Contiguous/Strided/StridedCast based on stride
  alignment, cast lossiness, and item size constraints
- overlap_copy_policy: safe overlap detection with directional copy resolution
  (NoCopy/ForwardCopy/BackwardCopy)
- NditerTransferFlags + validate_nditer_flags: nditer overlap/broadcast policy
  enforcement matching NumPy semantics
- FlatIterIndex + validate_flatiter_read/write: Single/Slice/Fancy/BoolMask
  indexing with bounds-checked read and arity-checked write contracts
- TransferLogRecord with is_replay_complete: structured replay-audit log records
  for conformance evidence chains
- TRANSFER_PACKET_REASON_CODES: 10-element stable vocabulary for packet-003
  transfer error categorization
- TransferError enum with reason_code() mapping to the vocabulary

fnp-conformance updates:
- Add fnp-iter dependency and wire packet-003 transfer tests
- Fix stride_tricks test to check expected-error cases instead of generic failure
- Add 3 new tests: vocabulary stability, replay completeness, missing-field rejection
- Comprehensive property-grid tests for selector and overlap determinism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
